text: The command authentication function shall authenticate uplink commands before execution.
The system shall maintain the command security state when required to authenticate uplink commands before execution.
The command authentication function shall reject commands with stale sequence counters.
The system shall maintain the command security state when required to reject commands with stale sequence counters.
The command authentication function shall log operator identity for every accepted command.
The system shall maintain the command security state when required to log operator identity for every accepted command.
The command authentication function shall validate command freshness against the configured command timer.
The system shall maintain the command security state when required to validate command freshness against the configured command timer.
The command authentication function shall isolate command buffers after authentication failure.
The system shall maintain the command security state when required to isolate command buffers after authentication failure.
The mission management function shall validate uploaded waypoints before storing the mission plan.
The system shall maintain the mission upload state when required to validate uploaded waypoints before storing the mission plan.
The mission management function shall reject mission upload when waypoint count exceeds the configured limit.
The system shall maintain the mission upload state when required to reject mission upload when waypoint count exceeds the configured limit.
The mission management function shall preserve the active mission until the new mission passes validation.
The system shall maintain the mission upload state when required to preserve the active mission until the new mission passes validation.
The mission management function shall set the mission_ready flag after all waypoints are verified.
The system shall maintain the mission upload state when required to set the mission_ready flag after all waypoints are verified.
The mission management function shall clear the upload buffer after a failed mission transfer.
The system shall maintain the mission upload state when required to clear the upload buffer after a failed mission transfer.
The navigation function shall compute navigation state from GPS and inertial reference data.
The system shall maintain the sensor fusion state when required to compute navigation state from GPS and inertial reference data.
The navigation function shall enter inertial fallback when GPS validity is lost.
The system shall maintain the sensor fusion state when required to enter inertial fallback when GPS validity is lost.
The navigation function shall raise navigation_degraded when position uncertainty exceeds the configured threshold.
The system shall maintain the sensor fusion state when required to raise navigation_degraded when position uncertainty exceeds the configured threshold.
The navigation function shall publish the selected navigation source to guidance.
The system shall maintain the sensor fusion state when required to publish the selected navigation source to guidance.
The navigation function shall restore GPS navigation only after validity remains stable for the configured timer.
The system shall maintain the sensor fusion state when required to restore GPS navigation only after validity remains stable for the configured timer.
The guidance function shall select the next waypoint after crossing the active waypoint acceptance radius.
The system shall maintain the waypoint guidance state when required to select the next waypoint after crossing the active waypoint acceptance radius.
The guidance function shall compute lateral guidance commands from current track and desired path.
The system shall maintain the waypoint guidance state when required to compute lateral guidance commands from current track and desired path.
The guidance function shall compute vertical guidance commands from target altitude and climb constraints.
The system shall maintain the waypoint guidance state when required to compute vertical guidance commands from target altitude and climb constraints.
The guidance function shall hold the active waypoint when navigation validity is degraded.
The system shall maintain the waypoint guidance state when required to hold the active waypoint when navigation validity is degraded.
The guidance function shall output guidance mode status to telemetry.
The system shall maintain the waypoint guidance state when required to output guidance mode status to telemetry.
The flight control function shall allow automatic mode entry only when navigation and guidance are valid.
The system shall maintain the automatic mode state when required to allow automatic mode entry only when navigation and guidance are valid.
The flight control function shall exit automatic mode when pilot override is detected.
The system shall maintain the automatic mode state when required to exit automatic mode when pilot override is detected.
The flight control function shall limit lateral control command rate to the configured bound.
The system shall maintain the automatic mode state when required to limit lateral control command rate to the configured bound.
The flight control function shall limit vertical control command rate to the configured bound.
The system shall maintain the automatic mode state when required to limit vertical control command rate to the configured bound.
The flight control function shall inhibit arming when any flight-control self-test fails.
The system shall maintain the automatic mode state when required to inhibit arming when any flight-control self-test fails.
The power management function shall estimate remaining battery capacity from voltage current and temperature.
The system shall maintain the battery readiness state when required to estimate remaining battery capacity from voltage current and temperature.
The power management function shall inhibit mission launch when battery state of charge is below the configured threshold.
The system shall maintain the battery readiness state when required to inhibit mission launch when battery state of charge is below the configured threshold.
The power management function shall inhibit mission launch when battery temperature exceeds the configured limit.
The system shall maintain the battery readiness state when required to inhibit mission launch when battery temperature exceeds the configured limit.
The power management function shall publish battery readiness status to mission management.
The system shall maintain the battery readiness state when required to publish battery readiness status to mission management.
The power management function shall record battery health trend data for maintenance.
The system shall maintain the battery readiness state when required to record battery health trend data for maintenance.
The communications function shall detect lost link when heartbeat messages are absent for the configured timeout.
The system shall maintain the lost link state when required to detect lost link when heartbeat messages are absent for the configured timeout.
The communications function shall enter lost-link behavior after the lost_link timer expires.
The system shall maintain the lost link state when required to enter lost-link behavior after the lost_link timer expires.
The communications function shall retry command acknowledgement within three seconds.
The system shall maintain the lost link state when required to retry command acknowledgement within three seconds.
The communications function shall queue telemetry packets while the downlink is unavailable.
The system shall maintain the lost link state when required to queue telemetry packets while the downlink is unavailable.
The communications function shall flush queued telemetry after link recovery.
The system shall maintain the lost link state when required to flush queued telemetry after link recovery.
The payload control function shall reject payload slew commands that exceed configured motion limits.
The system shall maintain the payload motion state when required to reject payload slew commands that exceed configured motion limits.
The payload control function shall stop payload motion when vehicle attitude is outside the safe envelope.
The system shall maintain the payload motion state when required to stop payload motion when vehicle attitude is outside the safe envelope.
The payload control function shall publish payload pointing status to telemetry.
The system shall maintain the payload motion state when required to publish payload pointing status to telemetry.
The payload control function shall hold payload position during automatic mode exit.
The system shall maintain the payload motion state when required to hold payload position during automatic mode exit.
The payload control function shall log payload constraint violations for maintenance review.
The system shall maintain the payload motion state when required to log payload constraint violations for maintenance review.
The health monitoring function shall run power-on self-test before enabling mission functions.
The system shall maintain the fault response state when required to run power-on self-test before enabling mission functions.
The health monitoring function shall aggregate subsystem health flags into a vehicle readiness output.
The system shall maintain the fault response state when required to aggregate subsystem health flags into a vehicle readiness output.
The health monitoring function shall raise emergency response when critical health flags are active.
The system shall maintain the fault response state when required to raise emergency response when critical health flags are active.
The health monitoring function shall store health-monitor events in the event log.
The system shall maintain the fault response state when required to store health-monitor events in the event log.
The health monitoring function shall clear transient health flags only after the configured debounce timer.
The system shall maintain the fault response state when required to clear transient health flags only after the configured debounce timer.
The software update function shall verify software update package signature before installation.
The system shall maintain the update safety state when required to verify software update package signature before installation.
The software update function shall reject update packages with an invalid rollback marker.
The system shall maintain the update safety state when required to reject update packages with an invalid rollback marker.
The software update function shall preserve the previous software image until post-update self-test passes.
The system shall maintain the update safety state when required to preserve the previous software image until post-update self-test passes.
The software update function shall block mission launch while update installation is in progress.
The system shall maintain the update safety state when required to block mission launch while update installation is in progress.
The software update function shall record software update result in the maintenance log.
The system shall maintain the update safety state when required to record software update result in the maintenance log.
The telemetry function shall generate telemetry frames containing navigation guidance power and health data.
The system shall maintain the reporting state when required to generate telemetry frames containing navigation guidance power and health data.
The telemetry function shall tag telemetry frames with source timestamp and sequence number.
The system shall maintain the reporting state when required to tag telemetry frames with source timestamp and sequence number.
The telemetry function shall drop telemetry frames that exceed the configured payload size.
The system shall maintain the reporting state when required to drop telemetry frames that exceed the configured payload size.
The telemetry function shall publish emergency telemetry immediately after emergency response entry.
The system shall maintain the reporting state when required to publish emergency telemetry immediately after emergency response entry.
The telemetry function shall report active control mode and mission phase to the ground station.
The system shall maintain the reporting state when required to report active control mode and mission phase to the ground station.
The fms function shall compute LNAV path transitions from active flight-plan legs.
The system shall maintain the lnav vnav fuel displays state when required to compute LNAV path transitions from active flight-plan legs.
The fms function shall compute VNAV targets from altitude constraints and descent path geometry.
The system shall maintain the lnav vnav fuel displays state when required to compute VNAV targets from altitude constraints and descent path geometry.
The fms function shall integrate fuel remaining with predicted time to destination.
The system shall maintain the lnav vnav fuel displays state when required to integrate fuel remaining with predicted time to destination.
The fms function shall display active flight-plan leg and lateral deviation to the cockpit display.
The system shall maintain the lnav vnav fuel displays state when required to display active flight-plan leg and lateral deviation to the cockpit display.
The fms function shall record flight-plan edits in the maintenance log.
The system shall maintain the lnav vnav fuel displays state when required to record flight-plan edits in the maintenance log.
